name: latex-html
description: Bounded LaTeX math subset to HTML (no MathJax)

scripts.build: npm run build:cli && npm run build:browser
scripts.test: npm run build:cli && node --test test/parser-aligned.test.mjs test/math-align.test.mjs test/html-cases.test.mjs test/lexer.test.mjs test/html-integral.test.mjs test/html-lim.test.mjs test/html-display-brackets.test.mjs test/html-bmatrix.test.mjs test/html-leftright.test.mjs test/html-cfrac.test.mjs test/html-multline.test.mjs test/html-array.test.mjs test/html-cd.test.mjs test/html-dirac.test.mjs test/html-dot.test.mjs test/html-standard-model.test.mjs test/html-cancel.test.mjs test/html-phantom.test.mjs test/html-riemann.test.mjs test/html-sqrt-nested.test.mjs test/html-brace.test.mjs test/html-binom.test.mjs
